summary: The video shows a highway scene with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. A black Mercedes-Benz sedan overtakes the ego-vehicle from the right side, passing closely while its brake lights illuminate briefly. Concurrently, a white SUV travels alongside the ego-vehicle in the same direction.

events_timeline.event: A black Mercedes-Benz sedan overtakes the ego-vehicle from the right side, passing closely while its brake lights illuminate briefly.

uncertainties: Brake light illumination duration is brief but may indicate urgency.

risk_assessment.why: Minimal risk due to brief overtaking maneuver and lack of collision indicators.
